scripts.desktop:smoke: npm run desktop:prepare && LEADFORGE_DESKTOP_SMOKE=1 electron electron/main.cjs
scripts.desktop:prepare-package: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:rebuild-electron
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:prepare-package && electron-builder --dir && npm run desktop:restore-node
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare-package && electron-builder && npm run desktop:restore-node
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:prepare-package && electron-builder --mac && npm run desktop:restore-node
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:prepare && node scripts/rebuild-standalone-electron.cjs --arch x64 && electron-builder --win --x64 && npm run desktop:restore-node
scripts.desktop:dist:win:arm64: npm run desktop:prepare && node scripts/rebuild-standalone-electron.cjs --arch arm64 && electron-builder --win --arm64 && npm run desktop:restore-node
